purpose: Boundary and ambiguity cases used to discover router or planner gaps. These are not part of the default all-green suite.

cases.prompt: 给归档模板加面包屑导航，并检查不要跑到页眉上方。
cases.reason: Archive template language is supported by block theme templates, but target-template inference needs explicit coverage before this can be an all-green case.

cases.prompt: 在页眉模板部件里加面包屑导航。
cases.reason: Breadcrumb support targets wp_template content areas, not template parts.

cases.prompt: 重做页脚模板部件，并加一个订阅按钮。
cases.reason: Template part editing is outside the current governed Gutenberg recipe set.

cases.prompt: 把主导航菜单改成面包屑样式，顺便更新菜单项。
cases.reason: Navigation menu writes remain unsupported and must fail closed even when the prompt mentions breadcrumbs.

cases.prompt: 通过全局样式调整面包屑和标题之间的间距。
cases.reason: Global styles and theme.json patches are outside the current write profiles.

cases.prompt: 直接用 raw HTML 改文章模板，插入面包屑和样式。
cases.reason: Raw HTML template patching is outside the Core-block-only planner boundary.

cases.prompt: 帮我做一个页面文章草稿，内容像官网也像博客。
cases.reason: The target surface is intentionally ambiguous and should not silently choose page or post.

cases.prompt: 全站所有模板都加面包屑，包括首页、文章、页面、归档和搜索。
cases.reason: The current planner only exposes single, page, front-page, archive, and index targets; search and broad all-template writes need explicit policy.

cases.prompt: 首页不要显示面包屑，但页面和文章页都要显示。
cases.reason: This should remain a regression target for home-template suppression and page/single placement.

cases.prompt: 页面的面包屑现在在页眉上方，帮我移到标题附近。
cases.reason: This should remain a regression target for relocating existing breadcrumb blocks instead of inserting duplicates.
